text.message: I am not plowing you blue
you had tons of better spots
you chose to ruin my game
Are you going to get upset because I did what you were trying to do to me? Lol
so I will just follow your action
Black getting wheat sheep and ore port
what I was trying to do to you?
with my setup, it was obvious I aim for that spot
Following my action would be playing the game normally and making the best plays for yourself
Nah, I am following your very first action, that was to ruin someone's else game
Only you interpreted it that way, it was clearly the best for me
Best for you would be to strike a deal and take any other of those 3 ports you had access to
Those ports aren't as good for me?
Again I'm just playing my game bro no one is targeting you
Ofc you are not targetting me, since I am out of game completely
Of you are out of game completely maybe make better placement
Orange about to city and run away with it
You have sheep port and soon ore port
Yes we established you are a bad player and a bad sport you don't have to keep saying it
Bad player with better win rate xD
Didn't get a single card in two full rounds
Red I appreciate that you came back and played the game straight
I guess he wasn't playing the game straight
was ready to feed you road blue
and why would I block blue
when I need him to take road
Red can take road for win now
Blue has open settle for win as well
